generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T ARSENICUM SULFURATUM FLAVUM. Arsenious Sulphide (AsS 3 ). Orpiment. Preparation , Triturations. Authority. 1 , "Lhr." in Hahnemann, R. A. M. L., 2, 118; 2 , Forestus, Obs., etc., 1619 (taken from Wibmer); 3 , Löw, Sydenham II (ibid); 4 , Gerbizius, Ephem., 1700 (ibid); 5 , Van Swieten, Crantz, Mat. Med. (ibid); 6 , Welper, Hufel. J., 1831, from the fumes (ibid); 7 , Henke, Zeitschrift (Z. f. hom. Kl., 1, 88). MIND. ► Intense anxiety and fear, [6] . ► Great apprehension, [2] . HEAD. ► Confusion of the whole head; too many thoughts crowd upon him (eight and a quarter hours), [1] . ► Violent dizziness on walking in the open air, felt through the whole head as from drunkenness (five and a half hours), [1] . ► Forehead cold, [6] . ► Needle stitches, externally, in the right frontal region (five hours), [1] . ► Throbbing stitches in the right frontal region (five hours), [1] . EYES. ► Gum in the canthi (thirty-three hours), [1] . EARS. ► On brushing the hair on the occiput, a tensive feeling behind the right ear, as if something stuck behind the ear and pressed it forward (one and a half hours), [1] . MOUTH. [10.] ► The teeth pain as if they were loose, on chewing the food (five hours), [1] . ► Tongue whitish-yellow, [6] . ► Tongue swollen, after several hours it becomes dry, [7] . ► Tongue stiff, immovable, [6] . ► Mouth and throat dry, [6] . ► Taste bitter, [6] . STOMACH. ► Total disgust for all nourishment, [7] . ► Thirst, [2] . ► Thirst slight, [7] . ► Excessive nausea after dinner, at noon (five and three-quarter hours), [1] . [20.] ► Nausea and vomiting, [6] . ► Violent and persistent vomiting, [7] . ► Vomiting and diarrha, [2] , [3] , [4] . ► Burning and gnawing in the stomach, [4] . ABDOMEN. ► Abdomen distended, soft, painless, [7] . ► Violent gripings, [2] , [3] . ► Violent colic as from a cold, morning on waking (twenty-five hours), [1] . STOOL AND ANUS. ► Tenesmus, [7] . ► Stool thin, liquid, frequent, [7] . RESPIRATORY APPARATUS. ► Respiration difficult ; this lasted several years, [6] . CHEST. [30.] ► Needle stitches from within outward, in the right side of the chest (six hours), [1] . HEART AND PULSE. ► Pulse frequent, hard; afterward small, thready, [7] . ► Pulse slow, suppressed; afterward rapid, scarcely to be felt, [6] . LOWER EXTREMITIES. ► Pains in left knee (twenty-five minutes), [1] . GENERALITIES. ► Twitchings, [2] . ► Twitchings for thirty years after taking it, [5] . ► General weakness, [6] . ► Fainting, [2] , [3] . ► Body cold, stiff, [6] . SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► A start on falling asleep in the evening, as if he would fall out of bed (eighteen hours), [1] . FEVER. [40.] ► Heat, [2] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning on waking ), Violent colic. ► ( Brushing hair ), Tensive feeling, etc. ► ( Chewing ), Toothache. ► ( After dinner ), Nausea. ► ( Walking in open air ), Violent dizziness. Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T ARSENICUM SULFURATUM RUBRUM. Arsenic Sulphide (or disulphide), As 2 S 2 . Realgar, Sandarach. Preparation , Triturations. Authority. Poisonous effects, from cases cited by Wibmer . ► Swelling of the face. ► Vomiting. ► Vomiting, profuse, slimy. ► Abdomen distended. ► Gripings in the abdomen. ► Diarrha, offensive, bilious. ► Heat and thirst. ► Fainting, absolute. ► Twitchings.
